title: Warning when promoting a version if nothing has been deployed yet
excerpt:

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Each version of your monday app is connected to a version in monday code.

If you promote your app’s version without deploying anything new to monday code, the old version will be used, but could affect your local environment and URLs.

To avoid this, David recommends adding a warning or block when promoting your app, just in case you’ve forgotten to deploy.

Posting on behalf of @dvdsmpsn - who mentioned it here
